description: Brazilian criminal faction originating from the state of Ceará, founded in 2021 by former members of Comando Vermelho dissatisfied with the group's leadership. It expanded with defectors from Guardiões do Estado (GDE) and became the largest faction in Caucaia by 2022. Engaged in violent conflicts with rival factions, including massacres and forced evictions. As of 2023, it maintains an alliance with Primeiro Comando da Capital (PCC).
